basic_details.job_title: NHM SHSRC Chief Advisor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: National Health Mission State Health Systems Resource Centres (NHM SHSRC)
basic_details.short_information: National Health Mission State Health Systems Resource Centres (NHM SHSRC) Chief Advisor Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of NHM SHSRC. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the NHM SHSRC Chief Advisor Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 65 years. Please refer to the official notification for age relaxation details.

qualification.education_qualification: Medical Graduate, Postgraduate in Public Health/Community Medicine, 15 years experience
qualification.details: Chief Advisor: Medical Graduate from a recognised institution and Postgraduate qualification in Public Health / Community Medicine / Preventive & Social Medicine (MD / DPH / MPH or equivalent) from a recognised university or institution with minimum 15 years of professional experience.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NHM SHSRC Chief Advisor Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 23-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NHM SHSRC to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download NHM SHSRC Chief Advisor Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: NHM SHSRC Chief Advisor Recruitment 2026 - Overview

rows.national_health_mission_state_health_sys: Medical Graduate, Postgraduate in Public Health/Community Medicine, 15 years experience

content_sections.heading: NHM SHSRC Chief Advisor Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the NHM SHSRC Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download NHM SHSRC Chief Advisor Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Chief Advisor: Medical Graduate from a recognised institution and Postgraduate qualification in Public Health / Community Medicine / Preventive & Social Medicine (MD / DPH / MPH or equivalent) from a recognised university or institution with minimum 15 years of professional experience.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age: 65 years. Please refer to the official notification for age relaxation details.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NHM SHSRC Chief Advisor Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 23-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NHM SHSRC to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NHM SHSRC Chief Advisor Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NHM SHSRC Chief Advisor Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the NHM SHSRC Chief Advisor post is 23 July 2026. Candidates are advised to apply well before the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Chief Advisor post?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy announced for the Chief Advisor position under the National Health Mission State Health Systems Resource Centres (NHM SHSRC) recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for the NHM SHSRC Chief Advisor Recruitment 2026 is Online. Interested and eligible candidates must submit their applications through the official website.

faq.question: Q4. What are the essential qualifications for the Chief Advisor position?
faq.answer: Candidates must be Medical Graduates with a Postgraduate qualification in Public Health/Community Medicine and possess a minimum of 15 years of professional experience in relevant fields.

faq.question: Q5. What is the maximum age limit for applying?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Chief Advisor post is 65 years. Age relaxation details, if any, should be checked in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for NHM SHSRC Chief Advisor posts?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the NHM SHSRC Chief Advisor Recruitment 2026. Applications are free of cost.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for the Chief Advisor role?
faq.answer: The Chief Advisor position with NHM SHSRC is a Contractual job type. This implies that the employment will be for a specific period as outlined in the official terms.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the "Official Notification PDF" link provided in the Important Links section of this article. It contains all detailed information.

faq.question: Q9. What is the official website for NHM SHSRC?
faq.answer: The official website for National Health Mission State Health Systems Resource Centres (NHM SHSRC) can be found via the "Official Website" link in the Important Links section.

faq.question: Q10. What is the selection process for the Chief Advisor post?
faq.answer: The selection process details for the Chief Advisor post are not explicitly provided in the extracted data. Candidates are advised to refer to the official notification for comprehensive information on the selection methodology.
